title: There!
overview: Hayati Altuntaş lives a meager life with his family. His brother Bekir, on the other hand, lives in luxury, running the jewelry stores he inherited from his wife's father. Hayati goes out every day to look for work, but luck is not on his side. On the other hand, he gambles away what little he has. His wife Saniye and his brother Bekir, among others, have all become the subject of gossip because of his situation. All Hayati has left are his dreams...
